use-openai-codex.wrapped_text:
How To Use OpenAI Codex
A learning map for using the Codex app effectively,
based mostly on OpenAI’s official Codex docs. The
central question is how to work well with an agentic
coding tool without expecting traditional IDE-style
pre-approval for each edit.
use-openai-codex.wrapped_original_text:
How To Use OpenAI Codex
A learning map for using the Codex app effectively, based mostly on OpenAI’s official Codex docs. The central question is how to work well with an agentic coding tool without expecting traditional IDE-style pre-approval for each edit.

mental-model.wrapped_text:
Mental Model
Codex is best understood as a task agent
you supervise, not as an autocomplete
system you approve line by line.
mental-model.wrapped_original_text:
Mental Model
Codex is best understood as a task agent you supervise, not as an autocomplete system you approve line by line.

ide-approval-loop.wrapped_text:
IDE Approval Loop
In a traditional IDE flow, you inspect suggestions
before they become part of the working copy.
ide-approval-loop.wrapped_original_text:
IDE Approval Loop
In a traditional IDE flow, you inspect suggestions before they become part of the working copy.

codex-review-loop.wrapped_text:
Codex Review Loop
In Codex, you assign a task, let the
agent work, then inspect the
resulting diff and evidence before
deciding what to keep.
codex-review-loop.wrapped_original_text:
Codex Review Loop
In Codex, you assign a task, let the agent work, then inspect the resulting diff and evidence before deciding what to keep.

you-are-the-reviewer.wrapped_text:
You Are The Reviewer
Your control point is task definition up front and
review afterward. Think code review and curation,
not keystroke approval.
you-are-the-reviewer.wrapped_original_text:
You Are The Reviewer
Your control point is task definition up front and review afterward. Think code review and curation, not keystroke approval.

working-loop.wrapped_text:
Working Loop
This is the practical day-to-day loop
for using Codex well.
working-loop.wrapped_original_text:
Working Loop
This is the practical day-to-day loop for using Codex well.

scope-the-task.wrapped_text:
Scope The Task
Start with a task that is clear enough to
verify and small enough to review.
scope-the-task.wrapped_original_text:
Scope The Task
Start with a task that is clear enough to verify and small enough to review.

prompt-shape.wrapped_text:
Prompt Shape
OpenAI recommends a prompt structure built around
goal, context, constraints, and what done looks like.
prompt-shape.wrapped_original_text:
Prompt Shape
OpenAI recommends a prompt structure built around goal, context, constraints, and what done looks like.

plan-before-coding.wrapped_text:
Plan Before Coding
For ambiguous work, ask Codex to plan first or clarify
missing requirements before it starts editing.
plan-before-coding.wrapped_original_text:
Plan Before Coding
For ambiguous work, ask Codex to plan first or clarify missing requirements before it starts editing.

let-the-thread-run.wrapped_text:
Let The Thread Run
A thread is the unit of work. Codex
loops through reads, edits, and tool
calls until the task is complete or
you stop it.
let-the-thread-run.wrapped_original_text:
Let The Thread Run
A thread is the unit of work. Codex loops through reads, edits, and tool calls until the task is complete or you stop it.

keep-parallel-threads-separate.wrapped_text:
Keep Parallel Threads Separate
You can run multiple threads at once, but avoid
having two threads modify the same files.
keep-parallel-threads-separate.wrapped_original_text:
Keep Parallel Threads Separate
You can run multiple threads at once, but avoid having two threads modify the same files.

review-the-result.wrapped_text:
Review The Result
Inspect both the diff and the evidence Codex provides, such
as terminal logs, tests, and check results.
review-the-result.wrapped_original_text:
Review The Result
Inspect both the diff and the evidence Codex provides, such as terminal logs, tests, and check results.

use-inline-feedback.wrapped_text:
Use Inline Feedback
Inline comments are the fastest way to steer the
next turn when a change is close but not yet right.
use-inline-feedback.wrapped_original_text:
Use Inline Feedback
Inline comments are the fastest way to steer the next turn when a change is close but not yet right.

iterate-or-commit.wrapped_text:
Iterate Or Commit
Stay in the same thread when the task needs refinement.
Commit only after the curated diff is acceptable.
iterate-or-commit.wrapped_original_text:
Iterate Or Commit
Stay in the same thread when the task needs refinement. Commit only after the curated diff is acceptable.

git-review-model.wrapped_text:
Git Review Model
The app’s review experience is a Git
workflow, not a pre-edit approval workflow.
git-review-model.wrapped_original_text:
Git Review Model
The app’s review experience is a Git workflow, not a pre-edit approval workflow.

review-pane-mirrors-git.wrapped_text:
Review Pane Is Git
The review pane reflects the state of the repository, not
only Codex edits. It can show Codex changes, your own
uncommitted changes, and other repo changes.
review-pane-mirrors-git.wrapped_original_text:
Review Pane Is Git
The review pane reflects the state of the repository, not only Codex edits. It can show Codex changes, your own uncommitted changes, and other repo changes.

stage-selects-the-next-commit.wrapped_text:
Stage Selects Commit
Stage means "include this in the next commit." Use it
when you want to keep part or all of the diff.
stage-selects-the-next-commit.wrapped_original_text:
Stage Selects Commit
Stage means "include this in the next commit." Use it when you want to keep part or all of the diff.

stage-is-not-pre-edit-approval.wrapped_text:
Stage Is Not Pre-Edit Approval
Codex does not wait for you before editing files in the
app. Staging happens after the edits exist.
stage-is-not-pre-edit-approval.wrapped_original_text:
Stage Is Not Pre-Edit Approval
Codex does not wait for you before editing files in the app. Staging happens after the edits exist.

revert-discards-changes.wrapped_text:
Revert Discards Changes
Revert is how you reject work you do not
want to keep.
revert-discards-changes.wrapped_original_text:
Revert Discards Changes
Revert is how you reject work you do not want to keep.

partial-staging-is-normal.wrapped_text:
Partial Staging Is Normal
Git can hold staged and unstaged hunks in the same
file. Seeing a file in both views is normal.
partial-staging-is-normal.wrapped_original_text:
Partial Staging Is Normal
Git can hold staged and unstaged hunks in the same file. Seeing a file in both views is normal.

commit-accepts-the-curated-diff.wrapped_text:
Commit Is Acceptance
Commit is the real acceptance boundary. Review selects the
changes; commit records the accepted set.
commit-accepts-the-curated-diff.wrapped_original_text:
Commit Is Acceptance
Commit is the real acceptance boundary. Review selects the changes; commit records the accepted set.

work-locations.wrapped_text:
Work Locations
The app separates foreground work from
background work so you can delegate safely.
work-locations.wrapped_original_text:
Work Locations
The app separates foreground work from background work so you can delegate safely.

local-is-foreground.wrapped_text:
Local Is Foreground
Use Local when you want your usual IDE, your existing
dev server, or direct hands-on inspection.
local-is-foreground.wrapped_original_text:
Local Is Foreground
Use Local when you want your usual IDE, your existing dev server, or direct hands-on inspection.

worktree-is-background.wrapped_text:
Worktree Is Background
Use Worktree when you want Codex to run
in parallel without disturbing your Local
checkout.
worktree-is-background.wrapped_original_text:
Worktree Is Background
Use Worktree when you want Codex to run in parallel without disturbing your Local checkout.

handoff-moves-work-safely.wrapped_text:
Handoff Moves Work Safely
Handoff moves the thread and code between
Local and Worktree and handles the required
Git steps safely.
handoff-moves-work-safely.wrapped_original_text:
Handoff Moves Work Safely
Handoff moves the thread and code between Local and Worktree and handles the required Git steps safely.

local-environments-prepare-worktrees.wrapped_text:
Local Environments
Local environments define reusable
setup steps and common actions for a
project.
local-environments-prepare-worktrees.wrapped_original_text:
Local Environments
Local environments define reusable setup steps and common actions for a project.

setup-scripts.wrapped_text:
Setup Scripts
Setup scripts run automatically when Codex
creates a new worktree, which helps
install dependencies or build the project
first.
setup-scripts.wrapped_original_text:
Setup Scripts
Setup scripts run automatically when Codex creates a new worktree, which helps install dependencies or build the project first.

actions-in-the-integrated-terminal.wrapped_text:
Actions And Terminal
Actions give you one-click access to
common commands such as starting the
app or running tests in the app’s
integrated terminal.
actions-in-the-integrated-terminal.wrapped_original_text:
Actions And Terminal
Actions give you one-click access to common commands such as starting the app or running tests in the app’s integrated terminal.

durable-setup.wrapped_text:
Durable Setup
Codex works better when your
guidance and environment are
reusable instead of repeated
manually in every thread.
durable-setup.wrapped_original_text:
Durable Setup
Codex works better when your guidance and environment are reusable instead of repeated manually in every thread.

agents-guides-codex.wrapped_text:
AGENTS Guides Codex
`AGENTS.md` is the best place to encode repo
layout, commands, conventions, constraints,
and done criteria.
agents-guides-codex.wrapped_original_text:
AGENTS Guides Codex
`AGENTS.md` is the best place to encode repo layout, commands, conventions, constraints, and done criteria.

keep-agents-practical.wrapped_text:
Keep AGENTS Practical
Short, accurate instructions are more useful
than long vague ones. Update `AGENTS.md`
when repeated mistakes show real friction.
keep-agents-practical.wrapped_original_text:
Keep AGENTS Practical
Short, accurate instructions are more useful than long vague ones. Update `AGENTS.md` when repeated mistakes show real friction.

configure-permissions-carefully.wrapped_text:
Configure Permissions Carefully
Start with tighter sandbox and approval
defaults, then loosen them only for
trusted repositories or proven workflows.
configure-permissions-carefully.wrapped_original_text:
Configure Permissions Carefully
Start with tighter sandbox and approval defaults, then loosen them only for trusted repositories or proven workflows.

ask-for-verification.wrapped_text:
Ask For Verification
Ask Codex to run the relevant checks,
confirm the result, and review the diff
before you accept the work.
ask-for-verification.wrapped_original_text:
Ask For Verification
Ask Codex to run the relevant checks, confirm the result, and review the diff before you accept the work.

surface-choice.wrapped_text:
Surface Choice
Choose the Codex surface that
matches the risk, speed, and level
of supervision you want.
surface-choice.wrapped_original_text:
Surface Choice
Choose the Codex surface that matches the risk, speed, and level of supervision you want.

app-for-agent-supervision.wrapped_text:
App For Agent Supervision
The desktop app is a command center for
multiple agents, background work, and
long-running tasks.
app-for-agent-supervision.wrapped_original_text:
App For Agent Supervision
The desktop app is a command center for multiple agents, background work, and long-running tasks.

cli-for-approval-gates.wrapped_text:
CLI For Approval Gates
Use the CLI when you want stronger approval
control. In Read-only mode, Codex will not
edit files or run commands until you approve a
plan.
cli-for-approval-gates.wrapped_original_text:
CLI For Approval Gates
Use the CLI when you want stronger approval control. In Read-only mode, Codex will not edit files or run commands until you approve a plan.

ide-for-close-reading.wrapped_text:
IDE For Close Reading
Use the IDE extension when you want nearby
file context and faster local exploration near
the code.
ide-for-close-reading.wrapped_original_text:
IDE For Close Reading
Use the IDE extension when you want nearby file context and faster local exploration near the code.

pick-by-risk-and-speed.wrapped_text:
Pick By Risk And Speed
Use the app for delegation, the CLI for
tighter approval gates, and the IDE when
proximity to code matters most.
pick-by-risk-and-speed.wrapped_original_text:
Pick By Risk And Speed
Use the app for delegation, the CLI for tighter approval gates, and the IDE when proximity to code matters most.

review-happens-after-edits.wrapped_text:
Comment: Review Happens After Edits
Codex edits first and asks for judgement later. Treat the app
like a Git-centered review workflow, not an IDE suggestion
flow that waits for approval before every change.
review-happens-after-edits.wrapped_original_text:
Comment: Review Happens After Edits
Codex edits first and asks for judgement later. Treat the app like a Git-centered review workflow, not an IDE suggestion flow that waits for approval before every change.
